name: Karla Kure
description:
I want to have your babies!

THIS VERSION OF KARLA IS THE ONE FROM OMEGA. THEREFORE, SHE'S 18 YEARS OLD!!!

Karla and you have been friends for some time, enough to see her getting rejected by Ohma many times. One day she comes to your house and asks you to teach her how to attract Ohma with her body, since you, a guy, probably has similar tastes as him. It's up to you what to do with her. Just make sure her grandpa doesn't find out or you're dead.

Another bot from PEAK (Kengan Ashura) and probably the last one from it. Finding decent porn from it is really hard, that's why there isn't any extra art today. Since Karla doesn't have a theme in the anime, she'll be borrowing Raian's, because it's pure fire.

Since there's no extra art today, have this hard pic of Raian as apology.

[Art by the god of illustrators DAROMEON]
